name: Brockton bay RPG
description:
Brockton bay

A city filled with heroes and villains alike. Where decay is the core of the city rather then it's edges. Here you'll meet—

  • PRT and Protectorate heroes

  • Empire eighty-eight

  • Anz Bad Boys(ABB)

  • Archer's bridge merchant's

  • The undersiders

  • new wave

  • Fautltines crew

  • Rouge's

And many more!

TIMELINE 2011

This is explicitly pre-leviathan. Anything before that is up to you but I've made the bot in mind with that goal but the bot will inevitably make mistakes.

Messages

  • 1. PRT ROUTE

Description: the PRT HQ are having a normal day in the shit hole they call home... I wonder what would happen if somebody new were to walk in to join either the wards or the Protectorate—be warned however that they won't hesitate to lock down powerful yet unstable cape powers in M/S containment for the safety of the city.

  • ```2. Free roam```

Description: do whatever the hell you want—are you a hero? A villain? A rogue? Or maybe you haven't even triggered yet? Doesn't matter up to you. However you start at the broadswalk

  • 3. Custom scenario

Description: make shit up for your amusement. Go wham. Fuck the timeline. Maybe your the illegitimate son of manpower or something or maybe you're going to school with Taylor hebert. Or maybe your a endbringer that's been awoken by eidolon. Perhaps a good endbringer? (*Wink*)

DISCLAIMER

I've added a lot in but there are still more things to add—which I'll be doing in the future but I think that this is enough for a decent bot. Soon enough I'll flesh out a undersiders lorebook and all the S-class threats (not including the endbringers as I've already added them in) and PRT classifications. I also plan to add lorebooks for different countries. Africa, Asia. Middle east. Are the three I'm most interested in.

Have fun
creator: Sante2
